tests_added: test_repo_ruff_linting - runs ruff check with F401,F821 on modified Python files
test_repo_black_formatting - runs black --check on modified Python files
test_repo_isort_check - runs isort --check-only on modified Python files
test_repo_codespell - runs codespell on modified Python files
test_repo_python_syntax - runs py_compile on all modified Python files
p2p_enrichment.notes: All 5 pass-to-pass tests verified working on base commit 117508dcd701cc2217209242407fb75f02f2c326. Selected lightweight linting/formatting checks that don't require heavy dependencies like torch/cuda. Excluded full pytest suite as it requires GPU and complex test dependencies. Excluded pre-commit full run as it requires installing hooks. All tests complete within 120s timeout.

validate.notes: Fixed syntax error in solution/solve.sh: line 40 'past_key_values=past_key_values,' was missing closing quote and colon. Changed to 'past_key_values': past_key_values,. After fix, patch applied successfully.
